name: Uniplus Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Uniplus Electronics Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, processing, and trade of various printed circuit boards. The company offers laminated multilayer printed circuit boards, basic circuit boards, and copper foil base boards, as well as aluminum substrates and lubricated aluminum covers. Uniplus Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
